faqs.question: Why do I have so many flies in my Flatlands home?
faqs.answer: Flatlands' proximity to Jamaica Bay wetlands and Marine Park creates ideal breeding conditions for flies, especially during spring and summer. Additionally, organic waste from yards, nearby marinas, and aging plumbing in older Flatlands homes can attract various fly species. Our inspection identifies the specific sources and eliminates them.
